headline: Circle Internet Stock Rockets After Earnings. The Stablecoin Company Is Betting on AI.

headline: Should Robinhood’s Q1 Profit, Buybacks, and Crypto Slump Require Action From Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Investors?
summary: In late April 2026, Robinhood Markets, Inc. reported first-quarter revenue of US$1,067 million and net income of US$350 million, alongside completing share repurchases totaling about 25.46 million shares under its 2024 buyback and an additional 26,274 shares under a new March 2026 authorization. The results highlighted rising overall revenues and platform assets but also a sharp quarterly drop in cryptocurrency revenue and the departure of the Chief Technology Officer, underscoring both...

headline: Is Robinhood Markets (HOOD) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Robinhood Markets (HOOD) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: What Happens To Your Investment Accounts When You Die, And Why Your Beneficiary Form Matters More Than Your Will
summary: A will tells your family who gets the dining room table. A beneficiary form tells your IRA custodian who gets the seven-figure retirement account. The two documents are not equivalent.

raw.headline: What Happens To Your Investment Accounts When You Die, And Why Your Beneficiary Form Matters More Than Your Will

headline: Cowboy Space Corporation Raises $275M Series B For Vertically-Integrated Orbital Data Centers and Rockets
summary: SAN CARLOS, Calif., May 11, 2026--Cowboy Space Corporation, the orbital infrastructure company founded by Robinhood co-founder Baiju Bhatt, today announced $275M in Series B financing at a $2B valuation led by Index Ventures, with participation from new investors IVP, Blossom Capital, and SAIC, alongside existing investors Breakthrough Energy Ventures, Construct Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, NEA, Interlagos and Baiju Bhatt.
